# Close Account

Customers can permanently close their account through the privacy section of their profile settings. When an account is closed, all saved payment methods and shipping addresses are deleted immediately; however, the order history is retained for a period of seven years to comply with tax and warranty obligations.

[Source: account_management.md#close-account]
